properties.description: Mapping Data Flow that cleans raw sales data with 5 transformations: removes nulls, removes negatives, normalizes all columns, recalculates total amount, and sorts by order_date ASC then order_id ASC.

sources.name: SourceSalesCSV
sources.description: Read raw sales CSV from ADLS Gen2 raw container

sinks.name: SinkCleanedSalesCSV
sinks.description: Write cleaned and sorted CSV to ADLS Gen2 processed container

transformations.name: RemoveNullRows
transformations.description: Remove rows where critical fields are null

transformations.name: RemoveNegativeValues
transformations.description: Remove rows where quantity <= 0 or unit_price <= 0

transformations.name: NormalizeAndRecalculate
transformations.description: Normalize category, customer_id, order_date formats and recalculate total_amount

transformations.name: SortByDateAndOrderID
transformations.description: Sort by order_date ASC then order_id ASC

typeProperties.script:
source(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false) ~> SourceSalesCSV

SourceSalesCSV filter(
	!isNull(order_id) &&
	!isNull(order_date) &&
	!isNull(customer_id) &&
	!isNull(product) &&
	!isNull(quantity) &&
	!isNull(unit_price)
) ~> RemoveNullRows

RemoveNullRows filter(
	toInteger(quantity) > 0 &&
	toDouble(unit_price) > 0
) ~> RemoveNegativeValues

RemoveNegativeValues derive(
	category = 'Electronics',
	customer_id = 'CUST' + right('00' + toString(toInteger(regexReplace(upper(customer_id),'[^0-9]',''))), 3),
	order_date = iif(
		locate('/', order_date) > 0 && length(order_date) == 10,
		toString(toDate(order_date, 'yyyy/MM/dd'), 'yyyy-MM-dd'),
		iif(
			locate('/', order_date) > 0,
			toString(toDate(order_date, 'MM/dd/yyyy'), 'yyyy-MM-dd'),
			iif(
				locate('-', order_date) > 0,
				toString(toDate(order_date, 'yyyy-MM-dd'), 'yyyy-MM-dd'),
				iif(
					locate(' ', order_date) > 0,
					toString(toDate(order_date, 'MMMM d yyyy'), 'yyyy-MM-dd'),
					order_date
				)
			)
		)
	),
	total_amount = toInteger(quantity) * toDouble(unit_price)
) ~> NormalizeAndRecalculate

NormalizeAndRecalculate sort(
	asc(order_date, true),
	asc(order_id, true)
) ~> SortByDateAndOrderID

SortByDateAndOrderID sink(
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
	partitionFileNames: ['sales_cleaned.csv'],
	partitionBy('hash', 1)
) ~> SinkCleanedSalesCSV
